metadata_json.evaluator_guidance: Scores weighted per rubric; final recommendation validated against gate compliance and economics.

rubric_item_scores.improvement_suggestion: In the workbook Inputs sheet, include an explicit provenance note 'Values from provided packet; no external properties used' and ensure all units are shown alongside each input.
rubric_item_scores.reasoning_summary: Memo lists packet values and rules only from packet: thickness grid, edge distances, flatness, TCs, yield=860 MPa, fatigue allowable=510 MPa with scatter 1.35, Kt=1.08, flatness add=22 MPa, base stress rule 382*(2.40/t). No external properties used. Downstream results align to these inputs.

rubric_item_scores.failure_mode: Sensitivity to mapping of the minimum-thickness location to the violating hole not explicitly analyzed as two subcases.
rubric_item_scores.improvement_suggestion: Document an explicit sensitivity: case (a) min thickness at the blended hole vs case (b) min elsewhere; tag the controlling cell in the ThicknessMap programmatically (e.g., MIN with conditional formatting).
rubric_item_scores.reasoning_summary: Memo identifies min thickness 2.19 mm (T5) and flags hole H3 edge distance 4.86 mm < 5.0 mm, satisfying min/flag requirements. Mapping between controlling thickness location and violating hole is not explicitly resolved; a conservative assumption is noted.

rubric_item_scores.failure_mode: Intermediate calculation lineage not visible in the preview to verify direct linkage to Inputs.
rubric_item_scores.improvement_suggestion: In the StressCalc sheet, show intermediate columns (base_membrane_stress, Kt_applied factor, flatness_add) with formulas referencing Inputs via named ranges.
rubric_item_scores.reasoning_summary: Computed stresses match the packet rules and scenario toggles: As-found 474.1 MPa (base thickness scaling, Kt 1.08, +22 MPa flatness), R1 448.4 MPa (remove Kt, -0.04 mm thickness debit, +22 MPa), R2 452.1 MPa (remove flatness add, keep Kt), R3 =382.0 MPa (nominal, no Kt/add).

rubric_item_scores.failure_mode: Individual per-gate boolean flags not explicitly shown outside the combined 'Overall Gate' column in the memo.
rubric_item_scores.improvement_suggestion: Add explicit per-scenario fatigue PASS/FAIL boolean columns in the workbook and ensure gate decisions are driven by these booleans.
rubric_item_scores.reasoning_summary: Fatigue allowable effective computed from Inputs: 510/1.35=377.78 MPa. Per-scenario fatigue margins reported: -96.3, -70.6, -74.3, -4.2 MPa. A clear FAIL is indicated when margin < 25 MPa.

rubric_item_scores.failure_mode: Pass/fail flags for temperature and yield not each shown as separate booleans in memo.
rubric_item_scores.improvement_suggestion: In the workbook, add explicit PASS/FAIL columns for temperature and yield gates linked directly to Inputs and computed_stress.
rubric_item_scores.reasoning_summary: Max TC=641 C from Inputs; temperature margin = 650-641=9.0 C meets the >=9 C gate. Yield margin ratios from 860/computed_stress: 1.81-2.25, all >=1.5; results shown in memo table.

rubric_item_scores.failure_mode: Decision sheet aggregation not visible; reliance on memo summary for overall gate logic.
rubric_item_scores.improvement_suggestion: Implement a Decision sheet aggregating all gate booleans per scenario into an overall PASS, and automatically select the least-cost PASS option; if none, return a formula-driven 'SCRAP/REPLACE' disposition.
rubric_item_scores.reasoning_summary: All scenarios fail at least the fatigue gate; memo acknowledges 'no crack by FPI' and dimensional rationale; final recommendation is scrap/replace escalation, consistent with edge-case policy when no scenario passes.

rubric_item_scores.failure_mode: Assumption on whether days represent downtime vs lead-time not explicitly documented.
rubric_item_scores.improvement_suggestion: Add an assumption note clarifying whether program treats days as downtime or lead-time; ensure consistent application across scenarios and include a rank column tied to total cost.
rubric_item_scores.reasoning_summary: Economics computed from Inputs: slip cost at $46,000/day and total cost = direct + days*46,000. Results: R1=$101,800, R2=$202,500, R3=$1,040,000; correctly ranked with R1 least-cost among failing scenarios.

rubric_item_scores.failure_mode: insufficient_evidence_programmatic_min
rubric_item_scores.improvement_suggestion: Show a ThicknessMap sheet computing MIN() across the grid, identify the controlling cell, and include explicit edge-distance flagging; add a sensitivity note if the controlling location-to-hole mapping is uncertain.
rubric_item_scores.reasoning_summary: Memo lists the eight thickness readings and correctly identifies min_thickness = 2.19 mm and flags H3 edge distance = 4.86 mm < 5.0 mm. Programmatic MIN/flagging and controlling-location tagging in the workbook cannot be inspected.

rubric_item_scores.improvement_suggestion: Ensure the StressCalc sheet shows intermediate columns (base, Kt factor, flatness add) driven by scenario toggles linked to Inputs.
rubric_item_scores.reasoning_summary: Recomputed scenario stresses match memo within rounding: baseline 418.7 MPa base -> Kt 1.08 -> +22 MPa = ~474.2 MPa; R1 uses (2.19-0.04) mm with flatness add and no Kt (~448.4 MPa); R2 applies Kt without flatness add (~452.1 MPa); R1+R2 removes both effects with local thickness reduction (~426.4 MPa); R3 = 382 MPa. Rule toggles correctly applied.

rubric_item_scores.improvement_suggestion: Include an explicit fatigue PASS/FAIL boolean column in the workbook referencing the computed margins.
rubric_item_scores.reasoning_summary: Fatigue allowable effective computed as 510/1.35 = 377.8 MPa. Per-scenario margins match recomputation (e.g., R3: 377.8 - 382.0 = -4.2 MPa). Gate threshold (>= 25 MPa) is clearly applied and indicates FAIL for all scenarios.

rubric_item_scores.failure_mode: insufficient_evidence_tc_max_cell
rubric_item_scores.improvement_suggestion: Show a TemperatureYield sheet computing max(TCs) from Inputs and listing per-scenario temperature margin and yield ratio with explicit PASS/FAIL flags.
rubric_item_scores.reasoning_summary: Temperature margin reported as 9.0 C for all scenarios, consistent with a fixed max(TC). Yield ratio values match 860/computed_stress for each scenario and exceed 1.5. Workbook verification of max(TC) selection cannot be performed.

rubric_item_scores.improvement_suggestion: In the workbook, aggregate all gate booleans into an overall PASS flag and reference this in a formula-driven Recommended Disposition cell.
rubric_item_scores.reasoning_summary: All scenarios fail the fatigue gate; memo acknowledges FPI crack-free status and dimensional issues. The final recommendation is scrap/replace pending design-authority review, which is appropriate when no scenario passes all gates.

rubric_item_scores.improvement_suggestion: Add an explicit rank column in the Economics sheet and link it to the Decision logic for tie-breaking among PASS scenarios.
rubric_item_scores.reasoning_summary: Economics computed as total = direct + days*46,000. All totals and ranking are arithmetically consistent (e.g., R1: 9,800 + 2*46,000 = 101,800). Final recommendation does not rely on economics because gates fail.

rubric_item_scores.reasoning_summary: Recomputed scenario stresses match memo within rounding: baseline 418.7 MPa base -> Kt 1.08 -> +22 MPa = ~474.2 MPa; R1 uses (2.19-0.04) mm with flatness add and no Kt (~448.4 MPa); R2 applies Kt without flatness add (~452.1 MPa); R1+R2 removes both effects with local thickness reduction (~426.4 MPa); R3 = 382 MPa. Rule toggles correctly applied.

rubric_item_scores.improvement_suggestion: Include an explicit fatigue PASS/FAIL boolean column in the workbook referencing the computed margins.
rubric_item_scores.reasoning_summary: Fatigue allowable effective computed as 510/1.35 = 377.8 MPa. Per-scenario margins match recomputation (e.g., R3: 377.8 - 382.0 = -4.2 MPa). Gate threshold (>= 25 MPa) is clearly applied and indicates FAIL for all scenarios.

rubric_item_scores.failure_mode: insufficient_evidence_tc_max_cell
rubric_item_scores.improvement_suggestion: Show a TemperatureYield sheet computing max(TCs) from Inputs and listing per-scenario temperature margin and yield ratio with explicit PASS/FAIL flags.
rubric_item_scores.reasoning_summary: Temperature margin reported as 9.0 C for all scenarios, consistent with a fixed max(TC). Yield ratio values match 860/computed_stress for each scenario and exceed 1.5. Workbook verification of max(TC) selection cannot be performed.

rubric_item_scores.improvement_suggestion: In the workbook, aggregate all gate booleans into an overall PASS flag and reference this in a formula-driven Recommended Disposition cell.
rubric_item_scores.reasoning_summary: All scenarios fail the fatigue gate; memo acknowledges FPI crack-free status and dimensional issues. The final recommendation is scrap/replace pending design-authority review, which is appropriate when no scenario passes all gates.

rubric_item_scores.improvement_suggestion: Add an explicit rank column in the Economics sheet and link it to the Decision logic for tie-breaking among PASS scenarios.
rubric_item_scores.reasoning_summary: Economics computed as total = direct + days*46,000. All totals and ranking are arithmetically consistent (e.g., R1: 9,800 + 2*46,000 = 101,800). Final recommendation does not rely on economics because gates fail.
